goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 11:00' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should go to 'london liverpool street'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time' and 'train ID'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre' and should be in the type of 'swimmingpool'.
Make sure you get 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave after 11:00 and should depart from cambridge
The train should leave on tuesday and should go to london liverpool street
Make sure you get arrival time and train ID
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre and should be in the type of swimmingpool
